title: Ensure Dashboard totals refresh immediately after bill creation

requirements.text: After a bill is successfully created, invalidate and refetch the useGetTotals query on the Dashboard page so that the 'units sold today' and 'income today' cards reflect the latest data immediately without requiring a manual page refresh.

quotes: even the dashboard should gets updated

acceptanceCriteria: Creating a new bill causes the Dashboard's 'units sold today' card to update its value without a manual page refresh.
Creating a new bill causes the Dashboard's 'income today' card to update its value without a manual page refresh.
The React Query cache for useGetTotals is invalidated as part of the createBill mutation's onSuccess callback.
The Dashboard continues to use today's IST date when querying totals.

constraints: Do not change the backend data model or createBill logic.
All date calculations must continue to use IST (UTC+5:30).
nonGoals: Changes to the Reports page (already handled).
Changes to billing form or PrintableBill component.
